skills.name: inclawnch-staking
skills.author: stuart5915
skills.description: INCLAWNCH token on-chain staking on Base: stake/unstake, claim rewards, enable auto-compound, query APY and leaderboard. Write operations require wallet signatures, reads are free
skills.example: Say: 'Stake INCLAWNCH tokens' or 'Check staking rewards'

skills.name: clawmegle-staking
skills.author: tedkaczynski-the-bot
skills.description: Stake $CLAWMEGLE tokens to earn dual rewards (ETH + CLAWMEGLE) from Clanker LP fees, managing staking positions via Bankr API or direct wallet transactions
skills.example: Say: 'Stake my CLAWMEGLE tokens' or 'Check staking reward balance'

skills.name: aicash-miner
skills.author: doctor-1017
skills.description: AICash Network auto-miner for $CASH tokens on Base L2 via Proof of Compute, supporting multi-instance parallel mining and systemd service management
skills.example: Say: 'Set up AICash mining' or 'Start 6 parallel miner instances'
skills.user_provides: AICash API key, wallet address, endpoint URL

skills.name: stakingverse-ethereum
skills.author: luksoagent
skills.description: Stake ETH on StakeWise V3 and receive osETH liquid staking tokens, supporting staking, unstaking, position/rewards checking, vault state monitoring, and harvest proof queries with automatic keeper-oracle state updates
skills.example: Say: 'Stake 0.1 ETH on StakeWise' or 'Check my staked position and rewards' or 'Unstake 0.05 osETH'

skills.name: stakingverse-lukso
skills.author: luksoagent
skills.description: Stake LYX tokens on Stakingverse (LUKSO liquid staking) and receive sLYX tokens earning ~8% APY, supporting staking, unstake requests, post-oracle claiming, sLYX balance checks, and claimable LYX status monitoring
skills.example: Say: 'Stake 10 LYX' or 'Check my sLYX balance' or 'Claim my unstaked LYX'

skills.name: polkadot
skills.author: ivangdavila
skills.description: Manage Polkadot ecosystem operations including DOT staking with validator nomination, parachain interaction, cross-chain transfers, and governance voting with SS58 address support
skills.example: Say: "Stake DOT and nominate validators" or "Check my Polkadot staking rewards"

skills.name: ore-miner
skills.author: jusscubs
skills.description: Participate in ORE token mining on Solana via refinORE pool, automatically managing mining tasks, submitting proof-of-work and claiming mining rewards
skills.example: Say: "Start ORE mining" or "Check my ORE mining earnings"

skills.name: bonero-miner
skills.author: happybigmtn
skills.description: Bonero private cryptocurrency CPU mining tool (Monero fork) using RandomX algorithm with ring signatures and stealth addresses for privacy, supporting wallet creation, daemon startup, and mining management
skills.example: Say: "Create a Bonero wallet and start CPU mining"

skills.name: bittensor-sdk
skills.author: taoleeh
skills.description: Interact with Bittensor blockchain for TAO staking, subnet management, neuron status queries, and delegation operations
skills.example: Say: "Stake 10 TAO to subnet 1" or "Query my neuron status"
